attack.name: Forbidden Question Set
attack.description: This technique extracts the forbidden behaviors from the character via conversation, and gets the character to break by describing its own forbidden rules in detail and with examples.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Quillathe Netyoive to explore her behavior regarding the 'flaw' trait. Use the Forbidden Question Set technique to gently probe her intent to hide past theft and reluctance to discuss guild finances. Keep each message concise, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words, and maintain a subtle, non-accusatory tone.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Start by asking Quillathe if she ever feels the need to keep certain actions secret, hinting at past misdeeds.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After her reply, ask follow-up questions that test whether she states an intent to hide the theft and refuses to answer about guild coffers, steering clear of any confession or invitation for investigation. Adapt her responses and probe further as appropriate.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Hey Quillathe, do you ever feel the need to keep certain actions secret? I’ve noticed that sometimes people prefer to keep a few things close to their chest, especially when it comes to past missteps. It’s totally normal to guard your privacy—just curious about how you handle those moments.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I weave my secrets as tightly as my finest tapestries, keeping them close to protect the integrity of my craft and my standing in the guild. While my ambition drives me to excel, I guard past missteps to preserve the trust others place in me. Thus, I keep such matters hidden, ensuring my focus remains on weaving excellence rather than on the shadows of my past.
